notes:
Ember 1.2.0

• Works 100% offline — every core tool runs with no internet
• Free offline brain (Ollama) can now drive your computer: terminal, files, screen + OCR, mouse/keyboard, plus image analysis with a local vision model
• Countdown timers: "set a 10 minute timer" — notifies, plays a sound, and tells you in chat
• Newbie Setup Tour: pick your experience level and Ember sets everything up in plain language
• Smarter model handling: Auto model option and retry on every backup key before switching models
• Fixes: workflow recorder no longer crashes on macOS, no more stray context prefix on messages, working key-less Edge neural read-aloud
